steps.t: Brúngwath is at Atburg, south-east of Aculf's camp in the Rushgore. Bagmund has asked you to drive Brúngwath from the Rushgore, in hopes that the shad…
Bagmund is at Aculf's camp in the Rushgore, north-west of Atburg. Eowils told you to return to Bagmund and let him know that you have dealt with Brúng…
